hero.title:
Explore Skiathos
by Sea
hero.subtitle: Rent a self-drive boat, book an exclusive private tour, or jump on a 24/7 water taxi. The Aegean is waiting.

whyUs.title: Fully Licensed & Insured
whyUs.desc: All boats meet EU safety standards. Full maritime insurance on every vessel.

whyUs.title: Local Expertise
whyUs.desc: Born and raised in Skiathos. We know every beach, cove, and passage on the island.

whyUs.title: 24/7 Water Taxi
whyUs.desc: No ferry schedule. We run transfers any time of day or night.

whyUs.title: 5-Star Rated
whyUs.desc: Over 800 five-star reviews on Google, TripAdvisor, and Booking.com.

whyUs.title: Safety First
whyUs.desc: Full safety briefing before every rental. GPS tracking on all boats.

whyUs.title: Always Available
whyUs.desc: Call or WhatsApp us any time. We reply within 30 minutes during operating hours.

seo.defaultDescription: Premium boat rental, private boat tours, water taxi and watersports in Skiathos, Greece.
